episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 373: Pinkerton At The Door
episode.description: James and Cliff walk you through all the latest MTGFinance news including the weekly Meta Analysis, Fast Movers, Cards to Watch and jump into the leaked Aftermath cards and the latest Secret Lair Superdrop.
